opening_intent: Hook with a counterintuitive graph question, welcome students to Arian University, and place this toolkit video inside Session 1 Preliminaries.
closing_intent: Close with three portable function skills and a handoff to the vending-machine model on the next slide.
lesson_arc: Earn attention with a sign puzzle students usually miss.
Orient students in the course path and name the payoff.
Promise the concrete skills this session will build.
Hand off to the simplest function model.

slides.speaking_goal: Hook curiosity, welcome students, and frame why this review matters for calculus.
slides.bridge_in: Open cold with the horizontal-shift prediction, then welcome and course placement.
slides.bridge_out: Move from the session promise into the roadmap and learning objectives.
slides.student_memory: Students should feel curious and know this review is essential groundwork, not optional filler.
